notes:
Workspaces remember your place. Entering a workspace — by ⌘1–9 or by clicking its lane in the sidebar — now returns you to the tab you were last on there, instead of always snapping to its first terminal. Each workspace tracks its own last tab independently, and the memory is seeded on launch so the first hop away and back works too.

Also: a new ⌘⌥O 'Recent workspaces' hint in the tips rotation.
